summary: Recorded the product-owner topology REQUEST_CHANGES, integrated the mature-game topology research recommendation, proposed ADR-010, and created a bounded M7 topology recovery chain before content-lock reconsideration.

tests_run.command: git fetch origin --prune; git pull --ff-only origin main; git checkout -b codex/m7-map-topology-recovery

tests_run.result: No READY tasks before this plan because content lock was blocked awaiting product-owner reconsideration.

decisions.decision: Adopt irregular District/Province polygon surface plus explicit Route/Transport graph as the project topology direction for M7 recovery.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED with content_lock_accepted=false and human_gate_state=REQUEST_CHANGES_MAP_TOPOLOGY_RECOVERY_REQUIRED.
Create DRAFT schema, fixture/content, client, and validation tasks; M7 exit cannot start until topology validation passes and product owner reconsiders content lock.

risks.summary: Topology recovery touches sim-core/protocol/content/save/client boundaries if implemented unsafely.
risks.mitigation: Start with ADR-010 and systems_architect review; split implementation into explicit package-owned tasks with validation.

risks.summary: Players may read low-fidelity districts as exact historical borders.
risks.mitigation: Keep M7 fixtures synthetic/COMPOSITE unless historical_researcher records claims and unresolved cultural risks route to Human Gate.

requested_action: Read-only review of ADR-010, product-owner REQUEST_CHANGES registration, downstream task scope, content-lock blocker state, and absence of product-code/content-source changes.
